title: Kaufbeuren Voting Guide 2026
subtitle: Practice the municipal election – interactive & clear
ballotSubtitle: of the City of Kaufbeuren on March 8, 2026
whoCanVoteValue: German and EU citizens aged 18+ who have lived in Kaufbeuren for at least 2 months.
postalVoteValue: Apply by March 6, 2026, 3:00 PM at the latest. Recommended much earlier due to postal delivery times.
disclaimer: This is a private information service and is not affiliated with the City of Kaufbeuren or the election office. All information without guarantee.
